IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT THE FILING FEE OF $80.00 FOR DEFT. MULUMEBT WORKU FIRST PAPER IN THE ABOVE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN TIMELY PAID. THEREFORE IT IS ORDER THAT THE ANSWER OF DEFT. MULUEMBERT WORKU IN THIS MATTER BE STRICKEN.
